message: Update 1.0.5: Realistic Bio-Synth heart+lungs circuit (no neon glow) + fixed Force & Motion drag (coin faster in air; vacuum equal). Close all Nova windows and reopen.
releaseNotes: 1.0.5 — Anatomical heart + lungs circulatory path. Force & Motion: feather no longer falls ahead of coin; English outcome panel. Three.js runtime (Godot embed later).
